text.title: Business Process Analysis Procedure
text.summary: 5-stage cycle from raw evidence to validated future-state diff.

step.name: identify-processes
step.input: Project brief + ops symptoms (rework, queues, dual entry)
step.action: Pick exactly one candidate process per cycle. Define entry/exit triggers.
step.decision-gate: If scope spans > 1 cross-team workflow, split into two cycles.

step.name: document-current-state
step.action: Build BPMN swimlanes. Cite source per step. Name owner per lane. Capture workarounds verbatim — do not paraphrase exceptions.
step.decision-gate: If any lane.owner_name is anonymous, BLOCK; raise to BA lead.

step.name: analyze
step.action: Populate analysis[] with value_add Y/N, cycle_time_min, cost_usd per step. Use "Data not available" if no source.

step.name: design-future-state
step.action: Emit future_state[] as diff (action ∈ {keep, cut, change, add}) with quantified expected_delta. Cap at 5 changes for v1.
step.decision-gate: If diff has zero "cut" or "change" rows, the analysis missed waste — return to step 3.

step.name: validate-and-ship
step.action: Collect per-lane signoff (PR comment / email / Slack ack). Validate JSON against schema. Ship.
